channel.title: ashishb/android-security-awesome Weekly Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track your favorite github awesome repo, not just star it.

item.title: ashishb/android-security-awesome May 31st - Jun 6th, 2021
item.description:
Tools

Online Analyzers

  • Approver - Approver is a fully automated security analysis and risk assessment platform for Android and iOS apps. Not free.

    • Tools

    Dynamic Analysis Tools

  • PAPIMonitorstars20 – PAPIMonitor (Python API Monitor for Android apps) is a python tool based on Frida for monitoring user-select APIs during the app execution.

    • Tools

    Reverse Engineering

  • Obfuscapkstars524 - Obfuscapk is a modular Python tool for obfuscating Android apps without needing their source code.
  • ARMANDroidstars2 - ARMAND (Anti-Repackaging through Multi-patternAnti-tampering based on Native Detection) is a novel anti-tampering protection scheme that embeds logic bombs and AT detection nodes directly in the apk file without needing their source code.

    • Tools

    Market Crawlers

  • PlaystoreDownloaderstars732 - PlaystoreDownloader is a tool for downloading Android applications directly from the Google Play Store. After an initial (one-time) configuration, applications can be downloaded by specifying their package name.

item.title: ashishb/android-security-awesome May 3rd - May 9th, 2021
item.description:
Tools

Static Analysis Tools

  • Mobile Auditstars44 - Web application for performing Static Analysis and detecting malware in Android APKs.
  • Several tools from PSU

item.title: ashishb/android-security-awesome Mar 29th - Apr 4th, 2021
item.description:
Tools

Online Analyzers

  • Pithus - Open-Source APK analyzer. Still in Beta for the moment and limited to static analysis for the moment. Possible to hunt malwares with Yara rules. More here.

item.title: ashishb/android-security-awesome Mar 15th - Mar 21st, 2021
item.description:
Tools

Static Analysis Tools

  • APKLeaksstars2.2k - Scanning APK file for URIs, endpoints & secrets.

item.title: ashishb/android-security-awesome Dec 14th - Dec 20th, 2020
item.description:
Tools

Static Analysis Tools

  • Quark-Enginestars563 - An Obfuscation-Neglect Android Malware Scoring System
  • One Step Decompilerstars160 - Android APK Decompilation for the Lazy

    • Tools

    Misc Tools

  • Android Mobile Device Hardeningstars96 - AMDH scans and harden device's settings and list harmful installed Apps based on permissions.
  • Opcodes table for quick reference
  • APK-Downloader - seems dead now
  • Dalvik opcodes

item.title: ashishb/android-security-awesome Sep 28th - Oct 4th, 2020
item.description:
Tools

Misc Tools

  • mitmproxystars22.3k
  • dockerfile/androguardstars33
  • Android Vulnerability Test Suitestars989 - android-vts scans a device for set of vulnerabilities
  • AppMonstars1.2k- AppMon is an automated framework for monitoring and tampering system API calls of native macOS, iOS and android apps. It is based on Frida.
  • Internal Bluestars395 - Bluetooth experimentation framework based on Reverse Engineering of Broadcom Bluetooth Controllers
  • Android Device Security Database - Database of security features of Android devices

    • Tools

    Vulnerable Applications for practice

  • Damn Insecure Vulnerable Application (DIVA)stars601
  • Vuldroidstars14
  • ExploitMe Android Labs
  • GoatDroidstars214
  • Android InsecureBankstars841

    • Tools

    Dynamic Analysis Tools

  • Housestars949- House: A runtime mobile application analysis toolkit with a Web GUI, powered by Frida, written in Python.

    • Tools

    Reverse Engineering

  • IntentSniffer

item.title: ashishb/android-security-awesome Aug 24th - Aug 30th, 2020
item.description:
Tools

App Vulnerability Scanners

  • Oversecured - A mobile app vulnerability scanner, designed for security researchers and bug bounty hackers. It also allows integrations into the DevOps process for businesses.
  • Devknox - IDE plugin to build secure Android apps. Not maintained anymore.

    • Tools

    Reverse Engineering

  • Procyon - Java decompiler

item.title: ashishb/android-security-awesome Jul 27th - Aug 2nd, 2020
item.description:
Tools

Dynamic Analysis Tools

  • Runtime Mobile Security (RMS)stars1.3k - is a powerful web interface that helps you to manipulate Android and iOS Apps at Runtime

item.title: ashishb/android-security-awesome Jun 22nd - Jun 28th, 2020
item.description:
Tools

Reverse Engineering

  • Noiastars75 - Simple Android application sandbox file browser tool

item.title: ashishb/android-security-awesome Jun 8th - Jun 14th, 2020
item.description:
Academic/Research/Publications/Books

Others

  • Android Reverse Engineering 101 by Daniele Altomare (Web Archive link)

    • Tools

    Online Analyzers

  • App Detonator - Detonate APK binary to provide source code level details including app author, signature, build and manifest information. 3 Analysis/day free quota.
  • BitBaan

    • Exploits/Vulnerabilities/Bugs

    Malware

  • Kharon Malware Dataset - 7 malwares which have been reverse engineered and documented
  • Android Adware and General Malware Dataset
  • Android PRAGuard Dataset - The dataset contains 10479 samples, obtained by obfuscating the MalGenome and the Contagio Minidump datasets with seven different obfuscation techniques.
  • AndroZoo - AndroZoo is a growing collection of Android Applications collected from several sources, including the official Google Play app market.

    • Tools

    Dynamic Analysis Tools

  • AndroPyToolstars212 - a tool for extracting static and dynamic features from Android APKs. It combines different well-known Android apps analysis tools such as DroidBox, FlowDroid, Strace, AndroGuard or VirusTotal analysis.

item.title: ashishb/android-security-awesome May 25th - May 31st, 2020
item.description:
Tools

Dynamic Analysis Tools

  • Droidboxstars584
  • Cobradroid – custom image for malware analysis

item.title: ashishb/android-security-awesome Dec 16th - Dec 22nd, 2019
item.description:
Tools

Dynamic Analysis Tools

  • Android Malware Sandboxstars185

item.title: ashishb/android-security-awesome Oct 21st - Oct 27th, 2019
item.description:
Tools

Online Analyzers

  • AMAaaS - Free Android Malware Analysis Service. A baremetal service features static and dynamic analysis for Android applications. A product of MalwarePot.
  • NVISO ApkScan - sunsetting on Oct 31, 2019

    • Tools

    Reverse Engineering

  • apk-mitmstars951 - A CLI application that prepares Android APK files for HTTPS inspection

    • Tools

    Dynamic Analysis Tools

  • ARTist - a flexible open source instrumentation and hybrid analysis framework for Android apps and Android's java middleware. It is based on the Android Runtime's (ART) compiler and modifies code during on-device compilation.

item.title: ashishb/android-security-awesome Sep 23rd - Sep 29th, 2019
item.description:
Tools

Reverse Engineering

  • Simplify Android deobfuscatorstars3.7k
  • Smali viewer
  • ZjDroid, fork/mirror
  • Dare – .dex to .class converter
  • Andromedastars628 - Another basic command-line reverse engineering tool

item.title: ashishb/android-security-awesome Jul 22nd - Jul 28th, 2019
item.description:
Tools

Dynamic Analysis Tools

  • Android DBI frameowork
  • Androl4bstars916- A Virtual Machine For Assessing Android applications, Reverse Engineering and Malware Analysis
  • Android Malware Analysis Toolkit - (linux distro) Earlier it use to be an online analyzer

    • Tools

    Market Crawlers

  • Google play crawler (Node)stars254 - get app details and download apps from official Google Play Store.

    • Academic/Research/Publications/Books

    Research Papers

  • Exploit Database

    • Academic/Research/Publications/Books

    Others

  • OWASP Mobile Security Testing Guide Manualstars7.4k

    • Tools

    Online Analyzers

  • Mobile Malware Sandbox
  • IBM Security AppScan Mobile Analyzer - not free

    • Tools

    Static Analysis Tools

  • Androwarnstars351 - detect and warn the user about potential malicious behaviours developed by an Android application.

item.title: ashishb/android-security-awesome May 27th - Jun 2nd, 2019
item.description:
Tools

Online Analyzers

  • Visual Threat - no longer an Android app analyzer

item.title: ashishb/android-security-awesome Apr 29th - May 5th, 2019
item.description:
Tools

Dynamic Analysis Tools

  • Android Reverse Engineering – ARE (android reverse engineering) not under active development anymore

    • Tools

    Reverse Engineering

  • Dedexer

item.title: ashishb/android-security-awesome Mar 25th - Mar 31st, 2019
item.description:
Academic/Research/Publications/Books

Others

  • Mobile Security Reading Room - A reading room which contains well categorised technical reading material about mobile penetration testing, mobile malware, mobile forensics and all kind of mobile security related topics

item.title: ashishb/android-security-awesome Jan 28th - Feb 3rd, 2019
item.description:
Tools

Online Analyzers

  • Tracedroid
  • CopperDroid

item.title: ashishb/android-security-awesome Dec 31st - Jan 6th, 2018
item.description:
Tools

Reverse Engineering

  • Dwarfstars944 - GUI for reverse engineering

item.title: ashishb/android-security-awesome Nov 12th - Nov 18th, 2018
item.description:
Tools

Static Analysis Tools

  • JAADASstars305 - Joint intraprocedure and interprocedure program analysis tool to find vulnerabilities in Android apps, built on Soot and Scala

item.title: ashishb/android-security-awesome Oct 15th - Oct 21st, 2018
item.description:
Tools

Dynamic Analysis Tools

  • ViaLab Community Edition
  • Mercury
  • Appie - Appie is a software package that has been pre-configured to function as an Android Pentesting Environment. It is completely portable and can be carried on USB stick or smartphone. This is a one stop answer for all the tools needed in Android Application Security Assessment and an awesome alternative to existing virtual machines.

    • Exploits/Vulnerabilities/Bugs

    Malware

  • Drebin
  • Admire

    • Tools

    Static Analysis Tools

  • ConDroidstars43 - Performs a combination of symbolic + concrete execution of the app

item.title: ashishb/android-security-awesome Oct 1st - Oct 7th, 2018
item.description:
Tools

Reverse Engineering

  • Jadxstars25.9k

    • Academic/Research/Publications/Books

    Others

  • doridori/Android-Security-Referencestars716
  • android app security checkliststars604
  • Mobile App Pentest Cheat Sheetstars2.7k

    • Tools

    Dynamic Analysis Tools

  • Taintdroid - requires AOSP compilation

    • Tools

    Online Analyzers

  • habo - 10/day
  • SandDroid
  • Stowaway
  • Anubis
  • Mobile app insight
  • Mobile-Sandbox
  • Ijiami
  • Comdroid
  • Android Sandbox
  • Foresafe
  • Dexter
  • MobiSec Eacus
  • Fireeye- max 60MB 15/day

item.title: ashishb/android-security-awesome Jun 18th - Jun 24th, 2018
item.description:
Tools

Online Analyzers

  • Appknox - not free
  • AVC UnDroid
  • Virustotal - max 128MB
  • Fraunhofer App-ray - not free
  • AppCritique - Upload your Android APKs and receive comprehensive free security assessments.
  • NowSecure Lab Automated - Enterprise tool for mobile app security testing both Android and iOS mobile apps. Lab Automated features dynamic and static analysis on real devices in the cloud to return results in minutes. Not free

item.title: ashishb/android-security-awesome Mar 26th - Apr 1st, 2018
item.description:
Tools

Market Crawlers

  • Apkpure - Online apk downloader. Provides also an own app for downloading.

item.title: ashishb/android-security-awesome Mar 5th - Mar 11th, 2018
item.description:
Tools

Static Analysis Tools

  • StaCoAnstars719 - Crossplatform tool which aids developers, bugbounty hunters and ethical hackers performing static code analysis on mobile applications. This tool was created with a big focus on usability and graphical guidance in the user interface.

item.title: ashishb/android-security-awesome Nov 20th - Nov 26th, 2017
item.description:
Exploits/Vulnerabilities/Bugs

How to report Security issues

  • Android Reports and Resourcesstars683 - List of Android Hackerone disclosed reports and other resources

item.title: ashishb/android-security-awesome Sep 18th - Sep 24th, 2017
item.description:
Tools

Static Analysis Tools

  • ApkAnalyserstars944
  • APKInspectorstars733
  • Droid Intent Data Flow Analysis for Information Leakage
  • DroidLegacy
  • Smali CFG generatorstars115
  • FlowDroid
  • Android Decompiler – not free
  • PSCout - A tool that extracts the permission specification from the Android OS source code using static analysis
  • Amandroid
  • SmaliSCAstars285 - Smali Static Code Analysis
  • CFGScanDroidstars43 - Scans and compares CFG against CFG of malicious applications
  • Madrolyzerstars89 - extracts actionable data like C&C, phone number etc.
  • SPARTA - verifies (proves) that an app satisfies an information-flow security policy; built on the Checker Framework
  • DroidRAstars39
  • RiskInDroidstars55 - A tool for calculating the risk of Android apps based on their permissions, with online demo available.
  • SUPERstars347 - Secure, Unified, Powerful and Extensible Rust Android Analyzer
  • ClassySharkstars6.8k - Standalone binary inspection tool which can browse any Android executable and show important infos.

    • Tools

    App Vulnerability Scanners

  • AndroBugsstars878
  • Nogotofailstars2.7k

    • Tools

    Dynamic Analysis Tools

  • Mobile-Security-Framework MobSFstars8.7k - Mobile Security Framework is an intelligent, all-in-one open source mobile application (Android/iOS) automated pen-testing framework capable of performing static, dynamic analysis and web API testing.
  • AppUse – custom build for pentesting
  • Drozerstars2.5k
  • Xposed - equivalent of doing Stub based code injection but without any modifications to the binary
  • Inspeckagestars2.1k - Android Package Inspector - dynamic analysis with api hooks, start unexported activities and more. (Xposed Module)
  • Android Hookerstars383 - Dynamic Java code instrumentation (requires the Substrate Framework)
  • ProbeDroidstars183 - Dynamic Java code instrumentation
  • Android Tamer - Virtual / Live Platform for Android Security Professionals
  • DECAFstars622 - Dynamic Executable Code Analysis Framework based on QEMU (DroidScope is now an extension to DECAF)
  • CuckooDroidstars514 - Android extension for Cuckoo sandbox
  • Memstars52 - Memory analysis of Android (root required)
  • Crowdroid – unable to find the actual tool
  • AuditdAndroidstars41 – android port of auditd, not under active development anymore
  • Android Security Evaluation Framework - not under active development anymore
  • Aurasiumstars36 – Practical security policy enforcement for Android apps via bytecode rewriting and in-place reference monitor.
  • Android Linux Kernel modulesstars164
  • StaDynAstars17 - a system supporting security app analysis in the presence of dynamic code update features (dynamic class loading and reflection). This tool combines static and dynamic analysis of Android applications in order to reveal the hidden/updated behavior and extend static analysis results with this information.
  • DroidAnalyticsstars28 - incomplete
  • Vezir Projectstars83 - Virtual Machine for Mobile Application Pentesting and Mobile Malware Analysis
  • MARAstars502 - Mobile Application Reverse engineering and Analysis Framework

    • Tools

    Reverse Engineering

  • emacs syntax coloring for smali filesstars29
  • vim syntax coloring for smali files
  • AndBugstars568
  • Androguardstars3.5k – powerful, integrates well with other tools
  • Apktool – really useful for compilation/decompilation (uses smali)
  • Android Framework for Exploitationstars170
  • Bypass signature and permission checks for IPCsstars70
  • Android OpenDebugstars118 – make any application on device debuggable (using cydia substrate).
  • Dex2Jarstars8.6k - dex to jar converter
  • Enjarifystars2.6k - dex to jar converter from Google
  • Finostars89
  • Frida - inject javascript to explore applications and a GUI toolstars146 for it
  • Indroid – thread injection kit
  • Introspystars436
  • Jad - Java decompiler
  • JD-GUIstars9.9k - Java decompiler
  • CFR - Java decompiler
  • Krakataustars1.4k - Java decompiler
  • FernFlowerstars2.2k - Java decompiler
  • Redexerstars137 – apk manipulation
  • Bytecode viewerstars12.1k
  • Radare2stars14.4k

    • Tools

    Fuzz Testing

  • Radamsa Fuzzerstars58
  • Honggfuzzstars2.2k
  • An Android port of the melkor ELF fuzzerstars56
  • Media Fuzzing Framework for Androidstars299
  • AndroFuzzstars32

    • Tools

    Market Crawlers

  • Google play crawler (Python)stars832
  • Aptoide downloader (Node)stars17 - download apps from Aptoide third-party Android market
  • Appland downloader (Node)stars13 - download apps from Appland third-party Android market

    • Tools

    Misc Tools

  • AXMLPrinter2 - to convert binary XML files to human-readable XML files
  • adb autocompletestars214

    • Academic/Research/Publications/Books

    Research Papers

  • Android security related presentationsstars135
  • A good collection of static analysis papers

    • Exploits/Vulnerabilities/Bugs

    List

  • Android's reported security vulnerabilities
  • Android Devices Security Patch Status
  • AOSP - Issue tracker
  • OWASP Mobile Top 10 2016
  • Exploit Database - click search
  • Vulnerability Google Doc
  • Google Android Security Team’s Classifications for Potentially Harmful Applications (Malware)

    • Exploits/Vulnerabilities/Bugs

    Malware

  • Android Malware Github repostars685
  • Android Malware Genome Project - contains 1260 malware samples categorized into 49 different malware families, free for research purpose.
  • Contagio Mobile Malware Mini Dump
  • VirusTotal Malware Intelligence Service - powered by VirusTotal, not free

item.title: ashishb/android-security-awesome Mar 6th - Mar 12th, 2017
item.description:
Exploits/Vulnerabilities/Bugs

Malware

  • androguard - Database Android Malwares wiki

item.title: ashishb/android-security-awesome Feb 13th - Feb 19th, 2017
item.description:
Exploits/Vulnerabilities/Bugs

List

  • Android Security Bulletins

    • Academic/Research/Publications/Books

    Books

  • SEI CERT Android Secure Coding Standard

    • Exploits/Vulnerabilities/Bugs

    Bounty Programs

  • Android Security Reward Program

    • Exploits/Vulnerabilities/Bugs

    How to report Security issues

  • Android - reporting security issues

App Vulnerability Scanners

item.title: ashishb/android-security-awesome Aug 3rd - Aug 9th, 2015
item.description:

Market Crawlers

  • Google play crawler (Java)stars496

item.title: ashishb/android-security-awesome Feb 9th - Feb 15th, 2015
item.description:
Tools

App Repackaging Detectors

  • FSquaDRAstars63 - a tool for detection of repackaged Android applications based on app resources hash comparison.

item.title: ashishb/android-security-awesome Jul 21st - Jul 27th, 2014
item.description:
Tools

Online Analyzers

  • AndroTotal

    • Tools

    Misc Tools

  • smalihook
